Hero.subtitle: I'm Rahmat — a Full Stack Engineer who builds resilient backend platforms with Golang & Laravel, and delivers polished, data-driven frontends with React & Next.js.
Hero.quote: "Clean code, resilient systems — product-ready by design."

Experience.title: Professional Experience
Experience.job1_desc1: Maintained and evolved a digital logistics aggregator, delivering feature releases and system improvements to support growth.
Experience.job1_desc2: Engineered PHP-based integrations for multiple shipping providers to broaden service coverage.
Experience.job1_desc3: Tuned performance and stabilized systems to reliably process high transaction volumes.
Experience.job2_desc1: Designed and implemented a modular Golang REST API (Gin/GORM) with clear separation of concerns for scale.
Experience.job2_desc2: Led development of a cross-platform Academic System (React + Capacitor) with live data syncing.
Experience.job2_desc3: Delivered an MBKM management solution on Laravel 11 featuring role-based access and advanced media workflows.
Experience.job3_desc1: Built a retail supply-chain app for agricultural equipment distribution, end-to-end.
Experience.job3_desc2: Implemented FIFO inventory logic and automated replenishment recommendations to reduce stockouts.
Experience.job3_desc3: Improved data access patterns using GORM and enforced secure JWT-based auth.
Experience.job4_desc1: Modernized legacy PHP codebase (PHP 5.6 → PHP 8.1) and migrated to Laravel 10 to enable future development.
Experience.job4_desc2: Built robust APIs and CRUD services for core domain entities: users, transactions, products.
Experience.job4_desc3: Participated in Agile planning, code reviews, and automated API validation with Postman.

Stats.title: Developer Metrics
Stats.description: Live-synced metrics that illustrate my coding cadence, focus areas, and delivery history.

Projects.title: Selected Work
Projects.p1_desc: Secure organizational platform for pharmaceutical students — Supabase backend, Vercel CI, advanced RLS and permission rules.
Projects.p2_desc: Performance-first typing test with real-time analytics and an uncluttered UI.
Projects.p3_desc: Composable seat-selection UI component for logistics apps — shipped as an NPM package.
Projects.p4_desc: SaaS-ready starter with secure auth, RLS, and real-time DB subscriptions.
Projects.p5_desc: Opinionated starter with React 19 (Inertia.js), Spatie roles, and media management.
Projects.p6_desc: Production-grade backend scaffold with JWT auth, Swagger docs, and Dockerized multi-db support.

Contact.description: Got a complex backend problem or product idea? I design and deliver reliable systems — reach out and let's explore how I can help.
Contact.available: Available for new projects and collaborations
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your project or challenge...

Footer.description: Building resilient, scalable systems and high-performance experiences with a focus on Clean Architecture and operational reliability.

Architecture.title: System Architecture & Design
Architecture.description: Beyond code — I design systems that are modular, observable, and scalable, from UML to API orchestration.
Architecture.f1_desc: Convert business rules into clear class, sequence, and flow diagrams for engineering alignment.
Architecture.f2_desc: Build decoupled systems using Clean Architecture and well-defined layer boundaries.
Architecture.f3_desc: Design schemas, indexes, and multi-db strategies for performance and reliability.
Architecture.f4_desc: Compose resilient APIs with secure auth flows and comprehensive documentation.
